message:
feat(codegen,query): COUNT(*) cheapest-index selection and direct EXISTS/NOT EXISTS MemDB probe

codegen.rs (bd-wwqen.1 COUNT optimization):
- For unfiltered SELECT COUNT(*), find the smallest non-partial
  index on the table (by column count) and open that instead of
  the table B-tree. Index B-trees have smaller rows and fewer
  pages, making the Count opcode's leaf-header walk faster.
- Defer table OpenRead to after the COUNT-vs-filtered branch so
  only the WHERE-filtered path opens the table cursor
- Fall back to table B-tree if no qualifying index exists

connection.rs (bd-wwqen.2 B2.2 direct EXISTS probe):
- New try_direct_exists_probe(): for simple correlated EXISTS of
  the form EXISTS (SELECT ... FROM single_table WHERE col =
  outer_ref [AND static_filter]), directly probes the MemDB table
  with a linear scan + early exit instead of cloning, substituting,
  and executing the entire subquery per outer row
- Gates: no CTE, no compounds, no GROUP BY/HAVING/DISTINCT, no
  LIMIT/ORDER BY, single FROM table (no joins/subquery sources),
  WHERE must exist
- Decomposes WHERE into AND terms via decompose_where_simple(),
  identifies exactly one correlated equality via
  extract_correlated_equality(), handles NULL outer values
  (EXISTS=false per SQL semantics), evaluates static filters
  in-place
- Wired into eval_expr_with_subqueries at the Expr::Exists arm:
  tries direct probe first, falls through to clone+substitute+
  execute for complex shapes

connection.rs (helper functions for EXISTS probe):
- decompose_where_simple/inner: flatten AND trees into Vec<&Expr>
- extract_correlated_equality/try_correlated_pair: find
  inner_col = outer_ref patterns
- resolve_outer_ref: resolve expression as outer column value
- cmp_values_sqlite: full SQLite-compatible value comparison
  (NULL sorts first, cross-type int/float coercion)
- values_equal_sqlite: equality comparison (NULL != NULL)
- static_filters_match/eval_static_filter/
  eval_simple_column_or_literal: evaluate static filter
  expressions against MemDB row values

connection.rs (additional):
- New test: named index on unique columns coexists with autoindex
- Extended composite index ORDER BY test to verify placeholder-
  backed prepared statements produce SeekGE-based ordered scan

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3046,16 +3046,40 @@ fn codegen_select_count_star(
 
     b.emit_jump_to_label(Opcode::Init, 0, 0, end_label, P4::None, 0);
     b.emit_op(Opcode::Transaction, 0, 0, 0, P4::None, 0);
-    b.emit_op(
-        Opcode::OpenRead,
-        cursor,
-        table.root_page,
-        0,
-        P4::Table(table.name.clone()),
-        0,
-    );
 
     if where_clause.is_none() {
+        // bd-wwqen.1: cheapest-index optimization for COUNT(*).
+        // Open the smallest non-partial index instead of the table when
+        // available — index B-trees have smaller rows and fewer pages.
+        // Uses the SAME cursor ID as the table would, so the rest of the
+        // program shape (Count, Close, Halt) is identical.
+        let cheapest_index = table
+            .indexes
+            .iter()
+            .filter(|idx| idx.where_clause.is_none())
+            .filter(|idx| !idx.columns.is_empty())
+            .min_by_key(|idx| idx.columns.len());
+
+        if let Some(idx) = cheapest_index {
+            b.emit_op(
+                Opcode::OpenRead,
+                cursor,
+                idx.root_page,
+                0,
+                P4::Index(idx.name.clone()),
+                0,
+            );
+        } else {
+            b.emit_op(
+                Opcode::OpenRead,
+                cursor,
+                table.root_page,
+                0,
+                P4::Table(table.name.clone()),
+                0,
+            );
+        }
+
         b.emit_op(Opcode::Count, cursor, out_regs, 0, P4::None, 0);
         b.resolve_label(done_label);
         b.emit_op(Opcode::ResultRow, out_regs, 1, 0, P4::None, 0);
@@ -3065,6 +3089,16 @@ fn codegen_select_count_star(
         return Ok(());
     }
 
+    // Non-COUNT path: open table cursor as before.
+    b.emit_op(
+        Opcode::OpenRead,
+        cursor,
+        table.root_page,
+        0,
+        P4::Table(table.name.clone()),
+        0,
+    );
+
     b.emit_op(Opcode::Integer, 0, out_regs, 0, P4::None, 0);
 
     let upper_reg = rowid_range.and_then(|range| {
